title: Async Task Manager
description: Implement an async function 'run_tasks(tasks)' that takes a list of coroutines and runs them concurrently using asyncio.gather. It should return a list of results. Handle exceptions within individual tasks by returning None for failed ones.
test_script:
import unittest, asyncio
from async_mgr import run_tasks
class TestAsync(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_gather(self):
        async def t1(): return 1
        async def t2(): raise ValueError()
        loop = asyncio.get_event_loop()
        res = loop.run_until_complete(run_tasks([t1(), t2()]))
        self.assertEqual(res, [1, None])
